comment: Per-device-type syslog catalog for Juniper MX240 (Junos) devices. Overlays the universal catalog (extends=true default): universal interface-up/interface-down/auth-* entries carry through; Junos-specific entries are added alongside. All entries use Class-1-only template vocabulary. Junos emits syslog with tag=daemon-name (e.g., mib2d, chassisd, mgd, snmpd) and the structured event identifier as MSGID (e.g., MIB2D_IFD_IFL_ENCAPS_MISMATCH, CHASSISD_FRU_TEMP_CRITICAL). Message bodies match Junos's canonical `MSGID: body` form verbatim so OpenNMS UEI matchers tuned for Junos events fire correctly. Entries requiring Class 2 fields are deferred: RPD_OSPF_NBRUP/NBRDOWN (NeighborRouterID), UI_LOGIN_EVENT (username). UI_COMMIT_COMPLETED ships in a no-user variant since Junos also emits bare `commit complete` lines when the user context isn't recorded.

entries.name: juniper-snmp-link-up
entries.template: SNMP_TRAP_LINK_UP: ifIndex {{.IfIndex}}, ifAdminStatus up(1), ifOperStatus up(1), ifName {{.IfName}}

entries.name: juniper-snmp-link-down
entries.template: SNMP_TRAP_LINK_DOWN: ifIndex {{.IfIndex}}, ifAdminStatus up(1), ifOperStatus down(2), ifName {{.IfName}}

entries.name: juniper-mib2d-encaps-mismatch
entries.template: MIB2D_IFD_IFL_ENCAPS_MISMATCH: Encapsulation mismatch detected on Interface {{.IfName}}

entries.name: juniper-chassisd-eeprom-fail
entries.template: CHASSISD_EEPROM_READ_FAIL: EEPROM read failure for FPC 0 (chassis {{.ChassisID}}, serial {{.Serial}})

entries.name: juniper-license-expired
entries.template: LICENSE_EXPIRED_KEY_DELETED: License for feature 'scale-subscriber' has expired, key deleted
